title: Creating Chaos!
description: This pack is just meant for pure fun and horror! with the mods included you can build cars and tanks or even mobile homes! you can build airplanes or airships or whatever you like, and there is horror, Yes! Horror in a create modpack, Enjoy!
body:
Creating Chaos! Is a pack based around Valkierien Skies, And Trackwork meant for PURE mindless fun and messing around with friends has lots of create stuff to also adding in guns and cannons, You can build cars, trucks, planes and much more! And is even more fun with friends!
WARNING: DO NOT USE ESSENTIAL MOD TO PLAY WITH FRIENDS!!! essential causes issues while testing that I currently cannot fix!
Instead I reccommend some sort of free (or paid) hosting EXAMPLES: Minehut, Shockbyte or Apex Gaming! These are all great options!
